cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 · 換局 三大
cover.subtitle:
숙종의 한 마디로,
붕당이 통째로 바뀐다.
cover.imagePrompt: Joseon folk minhwa + genre-painting tones. Hanji beige, ink-black, crimson, navy. Scene: a Joseon king in deep crimson royal robe seated on a raised throne dais inside Gyeongbokgung, with one hand raised in command. Below the dais, two groups of yangban officials in court robes — one group bowing low and being escorted out by guards on the left, another group bowing in greeting on the right. Composition: dramatic power shift, dynamic asymmetry. Color: hanji beige + ink-black + dominant deep crimson on the king + navy court robes. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

items.name: 숙종
items.desc: 왕권 강화 위해 환국 직접 주도.

items.title: 남인 몰락
items.desc: 갑술 후 남인 정치 회복 불가.

outro.tip_headline:
"경신=허적, 기사=송시열, 갑술=인현"
사건과 인물을 묶을 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 경신환국(1680, 허적 역모), 기사환국(1689, 원자 책봉·송시열 사사), 갑술환국(1694, 인현왕후 복위)의 핵심 키워드를 분리 암기해야 한다.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: three stylized swap arrows in a vertical column, each showing two small silhouettes exchanging positions. Cream #F2EDE3 base + ink-black + crimson #B45309 and navy #1E3A5F accent for opposing factions. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
